## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run prettier:check` pass
- [ ] `npm run test:ci` and `go test ./...` pass
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Version bumped in both `package.json` and `pkg/plugin/datasource.go` (if releasing)
- [ ] No changes inside `.config/`, and plugin ID/type unchanged
